\## 💡 Idea

Describe your idea clearly.



\## 🎯 Problem / Use Case

What problem does this solve?



\## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

How should it work?



\## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches?



\## 📦 Additional Context

Screenshots, examples, references.
